summary: Iteration 53 - 3-Phase Deep Testing Complete. Phase 1: 25/26 backend API tests passed (1 skipped). Phase 2: Redis caching, pagination, cache invalidation all working. Phase 3: Mobile-first frontend at 360px viewport verified - all UI elements properly sized and functional.

issues: Option button width is 286px at 360px viewport - could be slightly wider for better touch targets

critical_code_review_comments: Redis caching implemented correctly with proper TTLs (live-ticker=30s, points-table=300s, matches=60s)
Cache invalidation working on match status updates
Mobile CSS rules properly applied (min touch target 48px, safe-area-inset-bottom)
Question dots are scrollable with scrollbar-hide class
Sticky bottom navigation on PredictionPage working correctly
IST time format displayed correctly on match cards and live ticker
Smart sorting: live matches first, upcoming ascending, completed descending
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 completed comprehensive 3-phase testing. Phase 1 API tests: Auth (check-phone, login), Matches (list, status filters, match-info, contests), Contests (join, questions, predict, my-contests), Cricket (live-ticker IST, points-table), Wallet (balance, claim-daily), Admin (stats, templates, contests). Phase 2 Performance: Redis caching verified with X-Response-Time headers, pagination working with status filter, cache invalidation on status change. Phase 3 Mobile: 360px viewport testing - Live Now at top, IPL Table between Fantasy Points and match tabs, Upcoming/Completed tabs, IST time with calendar icon, bottom nav 62px height, PredictionPage with scrollable question dots and sticky navigation. Key data: PBKS vs GT live match, 16 questions with 1270 total points, 100,600 contest coins balance.

phase_3_mobile_tests.ipl_points_table: PASSED - 4 teams visible (MI, RR, RCB, DC)
